failing_reason.description: Assertion URL is an absolute external URI not prefixed with self#jumbf=

predicates.title: Assertion URI must be resolvable
predicates.description: If the assertion URI cannot be resolved and its data retrieved, the claim must be rejected with assertion.missing.

passing.description: Assertion URI resolves to accessible data within the manifest

failing_reason.description: Assertion URI points to a JUMBF box that does not exist in the manifest store

predicates.title: Assertion hashed-URI integrity check
predicates.description: The hash of the retrieved assertion content must match the hash declared in the hashed URI; a match records assertion.hashedURI.match and a mismatch rejects the claim with assertion.hashedURI.mismatch.

passing.description: Computed SHA-256 of retrieved assertion bytes matches the declared hash value

failing_reason.description: Assertion content was modified after signing, causing hash mismatch

predicates.title: Standard assertion encoding validity
predicates.description: The content of a standard assertion must be well-formed CBOR or conforming JSON; otherwise the claim is rejected with assertion.cbor.invalid or assertion.json.invalid respectively.

passing.description: Assertion is encoded as valid CBOR with all required fields present

failing_reason.description: Assertion bytes are truncated mid-CBOR sequence and fail to parse

predicates.title: Undeclared assertion detection
predicates.description: Every assertion present in the assertion store must be referenced by the claim's created_assertions, gathered_assertions, or legacy assertions array; any unreferenced assertion causes rejection with assertion.undeclared.

passing.description: All assertions in the store are referenced by the claim's created_assertions or gathered_assertions arrays

failing_reason.description: Assertion store contains a thumbnail assertion not listed in any claim array

predicates.title: Self-redaction prohibition
predicates.description: For each URI in a claim's redacted_assertions array, if any URI points into the claim's own manifest the claim must be rejected with assertion.selfRedacted.

passing.description: redacted_assertions contains URIs pointing only into parent manifests, not the current manifest

failing_reason.description: redacted_assertions contains a URI referencing an assertion within the same manifest

predicates.title: Assertion metadata field not validated
predicates.description: For assertions that support a metadata field, if the field is present the validator must not perform any validation on its contents.

then.description: metadata field contents are deliberately excluded from validation

passing.description: Assertion contains a metadata field with arbitrary content; validator proceeds without checking it

failing_reason.description: N/A - this predicate only tests that no failure is emitted for metadata content

predicates.title: Specific assertion type dispatch
predicates.description: For each assertion, the validator must check the assertion label and execute the type-specific validation steps for recognised assertion types.

passing.description: Each assertion label is recognised and dispatched to its specific validator without error

failing_reason.description: An assertion with label c2pa.ingredient has a missing required field, caught by the dispatched validator

predicates.title: Hashed-URI and hashed-ext-URI field validation in assertions
predicates.description: If any field of a standard assertion is a hashed_uri or hashed_ext_uri, the validator must perform hashed-URI validation on it, except for the activeManifest field in c2pa.ingredient.v3 which has special handling.

passing.description: Assertion contains a hashed_uri field whose hash matches the referenced content

failing_reason.description: Assertion contains a hashed_uri field whose declared hash does not match the referenced bytes

predicates.title: Alternative-content-representation structural validity
predicates.description: A c2pa.alternative-content-representation assertion must be the only one of its kind in the manifest, must contain exactly one of multiAssetPartIndex or embeddedOriginalPreservationImage, the active manifest must include a c2pa.hash.multi-asset assertion, and the multiAssetPartIndex must be a valid in-bounds index into the parts array.

steps.description: Exactly one of multiAssetPartIndex or embeddedOriginalPreservationImage must be present

passing.description: Single alternative-content-representation assertion, c2pa.hash.multi-asset present, multiAssetPartIndex is 0 and parts array has two elements

failing_reason.description: multiAssetPartIndex value equals the length of the parts array (out of bounds)

predicates.title: Alternative-content-representation embedded preservation image hash
predicates.description: When embeddedOriginalPreservationImage is present, its hash field must exist and the computed hash must match; success records assertion.alternativeContentRepresentation.match and mismatch rejects with assertion.hashedURI.mismatch.

passing.description: embeddedOriginalPreservationImage has a hash field and the computed hash matches the declared value

failing_reason.description: embeddedOriginalPreservationImage hash field is present but computed hash differs from declared value

predicates.title: Hashed-URI reference integrity
predicates.description: When validating any reference via a hashed-URI, the content retrieved from the reference must hash to the declared value; a mismatch rejects the claim with hashedURI.mismatch.

passing.description: Retrieved reference bytes hash to the declared value

failing_reason.description: Referenced resource was modified after signing, causing a hash mismatch

predicates.title: External reference validation procedure
predicates.description: If a validator retrieves external data from a cloud data or hashed external reference assertion, it must validate that data using the same procedure as for an embedded assertion of the same type.

steps.description: Fetch external data according to the reference location
Validate fetched assertion using the same rules as if it were embedded, dispatched by the label field

passing.description: External reference resolves successfully and the fetched assertion validates as if embedded

failing_reason.description: External reference is unreachable, causing assertion.missing

predicates.title: Ingredient assertion relationship field validity
predicates.description: An ingredient assertion must have a relationship field whose value is one of parentOf, inputTo, or componentOf; its absence or an unrecognised value causes rejection with assertion.ingredient.malformed.

passing.description: Ingredient assertion has relationship field set to componentOf

failing_reason.description: Ingredient assertion has relationship field set to unrecognised value 'derivedFrom'

predicates.title: Ingredient assertion activeManifest and digitalSourceType mutual exclusivity
predicates.description: An ingredient assertion must not contain both an activeManifest field and a digitalSourceType field simultaneously; if both are present the assertion is rejected with assertion.ingredient.malformed.

checks.description: Both activeManifest and digitalSourceType must not be present at the same time

passing.description: Ingredient assertion contains activeManifest but not digitalSourceType

failing_reason.description: Ingredient assertion contains both activeManifest and digitalSourceType

predicates.title: Exclusion range C2PA store content integrity
predicates.description: The validator must confirm that any exclusion range covering a C2PA Manifest Store contains only the manifest store itself and appropriate zero-padded or free/skip-box padding.

passing.description: Exclusion range contains only the C2PA Manifest Store followed by a free box of zero bytes

failing_reason.description: Exclusion range contains unexpected non-manifest, non-padding bytes after the manifest store

predicates.title: Hard binding assertion required for validation
predicates.description: The active manifest must contain a hard binding assertion; if none is present the manifest is rejected with assertion.dataHash.mismatch.

passing.description: Active manifest contains a c2pa.hash.data assertion

failing_reason.description: Active manifest contains no hard binding assertion of any type

predicates.title: Multi-asset hash fallback after standard hard binding failure
predicates.description: If the standard hard binding assertion fails to validate, the validator must attempt validation using a c2pa.hash.multi-asset assertion if one is present.

passing.description: Standard hard binding fails but a multi-asset hash assertion validates all parts successfully

failing_reason.description: Standard hard binding fails and no multi-asset hash assertion is present

predicates.title: Content validation failure signalling
predicates.description: If any content fails to validate, the validator must clearly signal the failure to the user and continue reporting failure even if later portions of the content validate correctly.

steps.description: Validate each content segment in order

then.note: Failure is retained regardless of subsequent segment results

passing.description: All content segments validate successfully

failing_reason.description: First segment fails validation; subsequent segments pass but overall result remains failed

predicates.title: Multi-part asset independent validation
predicates.description: An asset composed of multiple parts, each with its own associated hash, may have each part validated independently.

check.description: Validate each part's hash independently using the part's associated hash assertion

passing.description: Asset has separate image and video parts; both are validated independently and both pass

failing_reason.description: Asset has two parts; one part's hash does not match its declared value

predicates.title: BMFF Merkle leaf alignment to synchronisation points
predicates.description: For progressively downloaded content, Merkle tree leaf nodes may align to random access points (RAP) in the video track's mdat.

condition.description: Advisory: when leaf nodes align to RAP synchronisation points, validation can proceed incrementally during playback

passing.description: Leaf nodes align to RAP points; progressive validation proceeds without error

failing_reason.description: Leaf nodes do not align to RAP points; incremental validation is not possible but overall validation may still succeed

predicates.title: BMFF block fetch and track selection
predicates.description: During progressive validation, the required BMFF blocks must be fetched, validated, and their tracks selected for rendering.

steps.description: Fetch required BMFF blocks from the stream
Validate each fetched block
Select and prepare tracks within validated blocks for rendering

passing.description: All required BMFF blocks are fetched, validate correctly, and tracks are selected

failing_reason.description: A required BMFF block cannot be fetched during progressive download

predicates.title: Non-standard playback validation limitation signalling
predicates.description: When content is rendered in a non-standard mode (fast-forward, rewind, different speed), the validator may be unable to validate and must clearly signal this to the user.

then.description: Signal to user that validation is not possible for this playback mode

passing.description: Content is played at normal speed; full validation proceeds

failing_reason.description: Content is played at 2x speed; validator signals that validation cannot be performed

predicates.title: Pad and pad2 fields ignored in hash computation
predicates.description: During both BMFF hash and general box hash validation, the validator must ignore the presence and contents of pad and pad2 fields.

checks.description: Exclude pad field bytes from hash computation
Exclude pad2 field bytes from hash computation

passing.description: Hash computed with pad and pad2 fields excluded matches the declared hash value

failing_reason.description: pad fields are included in the hash computation, causing a mismatch

predicates.title: Box hash algorithm resolution and support check
predicates.description: The hash algorithm for each box-hash-map must be resolved from the map's own alg field, then the containing box-map alg, then the Claim alg; if unspecified or unrecognised, the manifest is rejected with algorithm.unsupported.

steps.description: Resolve alg: box-hash-map.alg -> box-map.alg -> claim.alg

passing.description: box-hash-map has alg set to sha256 which is in the allowed list

failing_reason.description: Neither box-hash-map, box-map, nor the Claim specify an alg field

predicates.title: Hash processing follows specified procedure
predicates.description: Once the hash algorithm is determined, hashing must be processed in accordance with the standard hashing procedure.

condition.description: Apply the resolved hash algorithm using the standard hashing procedure defined in the specification

passing.description: Hash is computed using SHA-256 following the standard procedure and matches the declared value

failing_reason.description: Hash is computed using a non-standard byte ordering, producing a mismatch

c2pa_rs_comparison.description: Comparison of predicate coverage against c2pa-rs SDK format handlers. c2pa-rs implements validation for ~20 MIME types via Rust AssetIO trait handlers.

C2paIO.note: This handler reads .c2pa sidecar files. No content binding validation needed.

fonts.note: c2pa-rs does not implement font validation. Our predicates cover the spec's font-specific rules.

zip_collections.note: c2pa-rs does not implement collection hash validation. Our predicates cover the full spec.

unstructured_text.note: c2pa-rs does not implement unstructured text validation. Our predicates cover the v2.4 text binding spec.

summary.our_predicate_coverage_beyond_c2pa_rs: 3 format families (fonts, ZIP collections, unstructured text)

field_level_deterministic.description: Predicates that check field presence, type, value range, and ordering. Fully automatable.

hash_computation.description: Predicates that require computing and comparing cryptographic hashes. Deterministic but require format-specific byte selection logic.

structural_validation.description: Predicates that require parsing format-specific structures (PDF incremental updates, BMFF box trees, font tables, ZIP directories). Deterministic but require format parsers.

cryptographic_validation.description: Predicates that verify cryptographic signatures, certificates, timestamps, and revocation status.
